message:
fix(aot): Remove invalid wamrc flags

SIMD, bulk-memory, and ref-types are enabled by default in WAMR 2.x.
The --enable-simd, --enable-bulk-memory, --enable-ref-types flags don't
exist - wamrc only has --disable-* variants for these features.

This was causing wamrc to fail with 'unknown option' on CI.
